title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing
description: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. Learners cumulatively produce an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Use only operations valid for every union member until evidence supports narrowing.
Choose unknown, any, and never from trust, escape-hatch, and impossibility semantics.
Narrow with typeof, equality, truthiness, in, instanceof, and discriminant checks while respecting edge cases.
